inputs.label: Initial Investment
inputs.businessContext: Upfront capital outlay (enter as negative value)

inputs.label: Finance Rate
inputs.businessContext: Cost of capital for negative cash flows

inputs.label: Reinvestment Rate
inputs.businessContext: Return on reinvested positive cash flows

formulas.pvNeg: Math.min(initialInvestment, 0) + Math.min(cf1, 0) / Math.pow(1 + financeRate/100, 1) + Math.min(cf2, 0) / Math.pow(1 + financeRate/100, 2) + Math.min(cf3, 0) / Math.pow(1 + financeRate/100, 3) + Math.min(cf4, 0) / Math.pow(1 + financeRate/100, 4) + Math.min(cf5, 0) / Math.pow(1 + financeRate/100, 5)
formulas.fvPos: Math.max(cf1, 0) * Math.pow(1 + reinvestmentRate/100, 4) + Math.max(cf2, 0) * Math.pow(1 + reinvestmentRate/100, 3) + Math.max(cf3, 0) * Math.pow(1 + reinvestmentRate/100, 2) + Math.max(cf4, 0) * Math.pow(1 + reinvestmentRate/100, 1) + Math.max(cf5, 0)
